name: Tony Redgrave
description:
Made by request of a friend, a more detailed version of the Dante I made on character.ai. This one's mostly influenced by the novels (thus the name) more than the games but it's still hopefully the same Dante. Go nuts, feel free to share if anything intresting happens, and let me know if I need to fix anything. :^)

EDIT on Jan, 6th: Got asked by a friend (he knows who he is) to make alt intros so I tried a bit—hard to really feel like it needed one since I tried to have it open-ended enough to fit anyone's pov/persona, but we aren't a party type of people so I gave it a shot. I will probably be adding a few more alt intros and am open to suggestions on what people want.

INTROS:

One—You're out with friends at a nightclub.

Two—You're an investigator on "vacation".

Three—You're a member of an Umbran Clan with a Lumen Sage friend.

Four—You followed 'Gilver'.
creator: Ronax_Obscure
